ocr_findings.description: Image captions 並盛/キロ盛/メガ盛/ギガ盛 are split across separate img-placeholder lines in OCR rather than grouped under a single illustration. All four labels are present and correctly spelled.

reviewer_notes: Page is Lesson 09-03 データの単位. Body text covering ビット and バイト definitions is accurately captured including the 256通り and 2の8乗 details. The コンピュータの世界の単位 introductory box is present. No substantive errors; layout of image captions differs slightly but all text is present.
